'''Haggleday''' was a [[Standard year/Legends|yearly]] festival of the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The [[holiday]] was observed with widespread revelry and bargaining.<ref name="CSWE II 6" /> On the [[Local day/Legends|morning]] of Haggleday, Squib [[Youngling/Legends|children]], known as fuzzlings, became extremely excited. When the Squib [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Macemillian-winduarté]] entered a hidden compartment on a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]]<ref name="SP" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[Spare Parts (short story)|Spare Parts]]" to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> the variety of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] inside made him feel like a fuzzling on Haggleday again, despite the machines' various states of disrepair.<ref name="SP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Haggleday was first mentioned in the short story "[[Spare Parts (short story)|Spare Parts]]," by [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. The story was published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|eleventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine in [[November]] [[1996]].<ref name="SP" />
